# MyTattoo

> Tattoo studio management software for artists and studios — online booking, digital consent forms, client management, and deposit collection in one platform.

MyTattoo helps independent tattoo artists and studio owners automate bookings, collect deposits upfront, handle digital consent forms, and build a client database. Used by 800+ artists. Reduces no-shows by 40%. 14-day free trial, no credit card required.

## Core Pages

- [Home](https://mytattoo.software/): Product overview, features, testimonials, and free trial
- [Tattoo Studio Software](https://mytattoo.software/tattoo-studio-software/): Full product overview — booking, consent forms, client management, deposits, and billing
- [Pricing](https://mytattoo.software/pricing/): Solo Artist plan for independent tattooists; Studio plan for multi-artist studios
- [About](https://mytattoo.software/about/): Product story and mission
- [Contact](https://mytattoo.software/contact/): Start free trial or ask a question

## Feature Pages

- [Tattoo Booking Software](https://mytattoo.software/tattoo-booking-software/): Online booking system with deposit collection, availability management, and automatic confirmation emails
- [Tattoo Booking App](https://mytattoo.software/tattoo-booking-app/): Mobile app for managing appointments, client messages, and session details on the go
- [Tattoo Artist Software](https://mytattoo.software/tattoo-artist-software/): Tools for independent tattoo artists — portfolio management, client cards, and booking links
- [Tattoo Scheduling Software](https://mytattoo.software/tattoo-scheduling-software/): Studio-wide session scheduling with multi-artist calendar views and conflict detection

## Tools

- [Tattoo Studio Revenue Calculator](https://mytattoo.software/tattoo-studio-calculator/): Free calculator to model studio revenue, session pricing, utilisation rates, and profitability projections

## Blog

- [Blog](https://mytattoo.software/blog/): 22 guides covering tattoo studio management, pricing strategy, client care, aftercare advice, and design trends

- [Privacy Policy](https://mytattoo.software/privacy-policy/)
